meaning: n.[微]卷曲霉素 ,卷须霉素 ,缠霉素
examples: Objective: to develop a turbidimetric method to determine Capreomycin Sulfate.
Method: Turbidimetric method was used to determine Capreomycin Sulfate, compared with diffusion method.
Methods: The tuberculosis of multi-drug resistance were treated with capreomycin, pasinizide, ofloxacin, rifampin compound and pyrazinamide for one year.
